task_completion.description: Verify the 'Chicago Distribution Center' location was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Chicago Distribution Center' in the Locations list or on a location details page, with the address '500 W Monroe St, Chicago, IL 60661, US'.
Look for 'Logistics' in the Departments list, ideally showing it is associated with the 'Chicago Distribution Center' location.

task_completion.description: Verify the user Thomas Rivera was created with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Thomas Rivera' (username: trivera) in the Users list or user profile page. Verify the email (thomas.rivera@example.com), title (Logistics Coordinator), and assignment to the Logistics department and Chicago Distribution Center.

task_completion.description: Verify ASSET-D001 and ASSET-D002 were relocated to the new site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Assets list or individual asset pages for ASSET-D001 and ASSET-D002. Their 'Default Location' or 'Location' should be set to 'Chicago Distribution Center'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct transfer notes were added to the relocated assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the asset history or details for ASSET-D001 and ASSET-D002 for the note: 'Transferred to Chicago DC for Midwest expansion - March 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the monitor (ASSET-M002) was checked out with a note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for ASSET-M002 in the Assets list or its detail page. It should be marked as 'Deployed' or checked out (likely to Thomas Rivera), and a checkout note should be visible in its history.

task_completion.description: Verify that other assets were not incorrectly modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the general Assets list to ensure assets other than ASSET-D001, ASSET-D002, and ASSET-M002 have not been moved to the Chicago Distribution Center or incorrectly checked out.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Snipe-IT web application in a standard web browser, navigating through forms and menus.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the HTML text of the page to simulate success.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows running curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries to insert the Snipe-IT records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires creating Location: 'Chicago Distribution Center' (500 W Monroe St, Chicago, IL 60661, US). Task requires creating Department: 'Logistics'. Task requires creating User: Thomas Rivera (username: trivera, email: thomas.rivera@example.com, title: Logistics Coordinator). Assets to relocate: ASSET-D001 and ASSET-D002 (must have default location 'Chicago Distribution Center' and note 'Transferred to Chicago DC for Midwest expansion - March 2025'). Asset to check out: ASSET-M002 (must be checked out with a note).
